critic_findings.message: # shellcheck disable=SC2064 suppresses a real shellcheck warning. The suppression is intentional (double-quote trap captures $lockdir at definition time), but zero-tolerance policy requires fixing the root cause rather than suppressing. Fix: export lockdir and use a single-quoted trap string, or restructure _with_lock to use a subshell so rmdir runs on subshell exit without needing trap.
